chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Acquittal Appeal No.S- 184 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 12841/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025. None present for the appellant. There is also no intimation. Same was the position on the last date of hearing when the matter was adjourned as an indulgence. On 16.01.2025 also none appeared for the appellant and the matter was adjourned with last chance. It appears that the appellant has lost his interest in pursuing this Criminal Acquittal Appeal which is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Tufail
